/opt/devkitpro/devkitPPC/bin/powerpc-eabi-gcc -DNDEBUG -g -O3 -Wall -I/opt/devkitpro/libogc/include -I/opt/devkitpro/extras/cpython/3.15.0a7/build-wii/../curl/wii/include -include /opt/devkitpro/extras/cpython/3.15.0a7/build-wii/../curl/wii/include/curl_wii_net_compat.h -DHAVE_POLL=1 -DHAVE_SELECT=1 -DHAVE_FCNTL_O_NONBLOCK=1 -DHAVE_BOOL_T=1 -DHAVE_POSIX_STRERROR_R=1 "CMakeFiles/curl-example-postit2.dir/postit2.c.obj" -o postit2  ../../lib/libcurl.a /opt/devkitpro/extras/cpython/3.15.0a7/build-wii/curl/mbedtls/install-wii/lib/libmbedtls.a /opt/devkitpro/extras/cpython/3.15.0a7/build-wii/curl/mbedtls/install-wii/lib/libmbedx509.a /opt/devkitpro/extras/cpython/3.15.0a7/build-wii/curl/mbedtls/install-wii/lib/libmbedcrypto.a
